_comment: v1 ships ONLY a SessionStart health check that NEVER blocks — it verifies the bundled stdlib-only engine imports so a broken install fails loud once. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} resolves to this plugin's install location. The optional Stop-hook acknowledgement gate (做法 3 — block session-stop until a Second Opinion report is acknowledged) is a future, opt-in, project-scoped add-on and is intentionally NOT wired here.
